positive: A cyberpunk cityscape viewed through a rainy window. Neon signs reflect off the wet pavement. Flying vehicles and towering, brutalist skyscrapers dominate the scene. Cinematic, high contrast, dark atmosphere, volumetric lighting, concept art, highly detailed.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, pastel colors, cheerful, soft focus
